name: Amir Vexler
background: Mr. Vexler has served as President and Chief Executive Officer since January 2024. Previously, he served as President of Orano USA from 2021 to 2023 and held various leadership roles at GE-Hitachi Nuclear Energy, including CEO of Global Nuclear Fuel.

commpanies.name: Centrus Energy Corp.
commpanies.title_or_role: Director, President and Chief Executive Officer
